KioskPage.title: Flourish: Hubinta Fayo-qabka
KioskPage.description: Hubinta fayo-qabka ee aan magaca la sheegin ee martida.

WellnessFlow.anonymousLine: Jawaabta aad bixiso waa sir, waxayna naga caawisaa inaan daryeel ka wanaagsan bixino.
WellnessFlow.accessCodeSubtitle: Geli koodhka gelitaanka hoyga si aad u diyaarisid qalabka.
WellnessFlow.shortQuestionsLabel: Ka jawaab 3 su'aalood oo degdeg ah…
WellnessFlow.shortQuestionsSubtitle: si aad noo sheegto wax badan oo ku saabsan sidaad hadda dareemayso
WellnessFlow.longQuestionsSubtitle: si aad noo sheegto wax badan oo ku saabsan sidaad dareemaysay toddobaadkii la soo dhaafay
WellnessFlow.almostDoneSubtitle: Hadda soo gudbi jawaabaha, ama sii wad su'aalaha ikhtiyaariga ah ee aadan weli ka jawaabin.
WellnessFlow.longFormSubtitle: Dhammaantood waa ikhtiyaari — dooro jawaabaha kugu habboon. Hoos u dhaadhac si aad u soo gudbiso.
WellnessFlow.thanks: Waad ku mahadsan tahay soo hubintaada!
WellnessFlow.responseRecorded: Jawaabta aad bixisay waa la diiwaan geliyey.

ShortQuestions.short-1-prompt: Kuwan midkee kuugu caawin lahaa hadda?
ShortQuestions.short-1-opt-0: Inaan la hadlo dad ii eg
ShortQuestions.short-1-opt-4: In la abuuro hadafyo iyo mudnaaneyaal
ShortQuestions.short-2-prompt: Noocee dhaqdhaqaaq ah ayaa hadda kuu fiican ama aad awooddo?
ShortQuestions.short-2-opt-4: Cayaar ama dhaqdhaqaaq muusig ku saleysan
ShortQuestions.short-3-prompt: Hawlaha kuwan midkee kaa caawiya inaad dareento inaad tahay adiga?

LongQuestions.long-1-prompt: Marka aad ka fikirto heerka walbahaarka aad qabto labadii toddobaad ee la soo dhaafay, ma odhan lahayd in maalinta ugu badani ay ahaayeen…
LongQuestions.long-2-prompt: Inta jeer ma dareentay rajada labadii toddobaad ee la soo dhaafay?
LongQuestions.long-3-prompt: Sidee jirkaagu dareemayay toddobaadkan? (Dooro dhammaan kuwa kugu habboon)
LongQuestions.long-4-prompt: Sideed u qiimeyn lahayd helitaanka cunto nafaqa leh oo baahidaada ku habboon?
LongQuestions.long-5-prompt: Sideed u qiimeyn lahayd dareenkaaga ku aaddan inaa ka tirsan tahay bulshadaada?
LongQuestions.long-6-prompt: Noocyee barnaamijyo ah ayaad xiiseyn lahayd? (Dooro dhammaan kuwa kugu habboon)
